scope: manual competitive rewrite candidates from vue importance-3 batch 01

reasons: the answer is still too descriptive and not decision-first enough
dependency visibility and ownership trade-offs are not surfaced early enough
items.recommendedAction: if revisited later, replace part of the descriptive overview with a stronger ownership and registration decision block plus a short list of acceptable global-component exceptions

reasons: the opening still reads too much like a Vuex concept inventory instead of a store-boundary decision answer
global-state vs local-state rules are not sharp enough
modern Vue architectural trade-offs are underdeveloped
items.recommendedAction: if revisited later, reframe the opening around when centralized shared state is worth the ceremony, then add a local-vs-global state matrix and one stronger warning against making Vuex the default home for all state
